nasb.text: He turned the sea into dry land; They passed through the river on foot; There let us rejoice in Him!

esv.text: He turned the sea into dry land; they passed through the river on foot. There did we rejoice in him,

cnv.text: 他把海變為乾地， 眾人就步行過河， 我們要在那裡因他歡喜。

ccb.text: 祂将沧海变为干地， 让百姓步行经过。 让我们因祂的作为而欢欣吧！

csbs.text: 他曾把海变成干地， 众人曾步行过河—— 在那里，让我们因他而欢喜！
